title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
summary: Researchers used AI and computer vision to virtually unwrap and read a carbonized Herculaneum scroll buried by Vesuvius in 79 AD. The project, part of the Vesuvius Challenge, combined 3D X-ray scanning with machine learning to detect ink and reconstruct text, revealing philosophical writings. This marks the first complete reading of such a scroll.
